title: DT - Login as Jim with correct password solves challenge
test_steps:
Navigate to login page
Enter username 'Jim' and correct password
Click login button
Verify login is successful
Check that loginJimChallenge is solved
expected_result: Login succeeded and loginJimChallenge is solved

title: State transition path 1 (ALL_TRANSITIONS)
coverage_items: NotLoggedIn--login[Login as Jim and Login is successful]/Solve loginJimChallenge-->ChallengeSolved

title: EP - Successful login as Jim solves challenge
test_steps:
Navigate to login page
Enter username 'Jim' and correct password
Click login button
Verify login is successful
Check that loginJimChallenge is marked as solved
expected_result: Login succeeded and loginJimChallenge is solved
